scripts.dev: concurrently --names "crm,copilot" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "pnpm --dir apps/crm run dev" "pnpm --dir apps/copilot-service run dev" "wait-on tcp:3000 && echo '🚀 crm ready on :3000'" "wait-on tcp:3001 && echo '🚀 copilot-service ready on :3001'"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir apps/crm run build && pnpm --dir apps/copilot-service run build
